strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts library)

response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack engineering with the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) demonstrated at Optilyz and re:cinq. The current re:cinq role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Testing expertise is well-evidenced through TDD practice at RIDE Capital, authoring Fluent-Asserts, and teaching a Selenium/TDD course. Cloud (AWS CDK at Optilyz) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes for GISCollective) are present. Gaps: Nest.js is not mentioned, Kotlin is absent, and Java experience is dated — but the breadth and adaptability across languages suggest these are learnable.
